title: Clippit word build run result
description: Result payload of `clippit word build run` written to stdout on success (JSON mode).

output.description: Absolute path of the produced .docx file, or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

outputSize.description: Size of the output .docx file in bytes.

entryCount.description: Total number of deck entries (sections + file entries).

entries.description: Per-entry breakdown in deck order. Each entry is either a section label or a file contribution.

section.description: Name of a logical section label (mutually exclusive with 'file').

file.description: Manifest-relative path of a source .docx file (mutually exclusive with 'section').

elements.description: Number of body elements copied from this file entry.
